title: Marine Planning Monitoring Surveys 2025 Summary
body: "The Marine Planning Monitoring Surveys were delivered alongside marine plan user training sessions. In total, the Marine Management Organisation (MMO) received 85 completed submissions to the Marine Planning Monitoring Surveys.  The responses will be used to inform our future marine plan monitoring and reporting activities for England’s six adopted marine plans. Previous reports are available for the East, South, North East, North West, South East and South West Marine Plans. "
